title: vicia ciliaris
intro: Vicia ciliaris, also known as the hop clover or tufted vetch, is a perennial legume native to Europe and Asia. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Vicia ciliaris include potential applications in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as supporting cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
